functions.title: Guide Book #48
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #48§r
§lSquirrel§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Small mammal, Animal.
•§lSpawns in§r: Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Pale Garden, Windswept Forest,

Taiga, Snowy Taiga, Jungle, Cherry Grove, Meadow, Savanna.
•§lHealth§r: 6 §o(Wild)§r | 20 §o(Tamed)§r
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.3
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Apples, Beetroot, Berries, Melon, Pumpkin Slice.
•§lHealed by§r: Apples,

Beetroot, Berries, Melon, Pumpkin Slice.
•§lBreeds with§r: Beetroot, Berries, Melon, Pumpkin Slice.
•§lAging by§r: Apples, Beetroot, Berries, Melon, Pumpkin Slice.
•§lTamed by§r: Apple.
•§lPossible drops§r: Raw Squirrel, Squirrel Hide,

XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r §o(Wild)§r: Players, Cave Wolf, Deopard, Ocelot, Raven, Wolf, Monsters.
•§lAvoids§r §o(Tamed)§r: Monsters.
•Wild Squirrel can randomly sit.
•Tamed Squirrel can be sat down.
•Wild Squirrel can pick up the food that

tempts them and eat it.
•Wild Squirrel can destroy crops.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Quick-footed and mischievous, the Squirrel brings life and a hint of chaos to forests and fields alike.
